body.visualDesc: DUSK twilight scene under the Big Oak - deep purple-amber evening sky, low golden sun, long shadows, first fireflies glowing. THREE chicks frozen around a golden straw nest, holding their breath. LEFT: Mo, blue-grey chick, chunky red knitted scarf, tall red comb, motionless, wings folded. CENTER: Bo, tan sandy-brown chick - she WEARS round thin wire-framed eyeglasses on her beak (clearly visible) and a green neck scarf - both wings pressed to her cheeks in suspense. RIGHT: Pip, cream-white chick - she WEARS her straw farmer hat on her head (clearly visible, this is mandatory) and a red neck bandana - one wing hovering frozen mid-air above the egg. In the nest: ONE pale-cream egg, shell closed, two thin hairline cracks with a faint warm glow. Exactly three chicks, one egg, no other creatures. Cinematic stillness, breath-held tension.
